arts.ttl: David Moyes now Everton's top target to replace Sean Dyche as new sack details emerge
arts.sum: The Toffees are considering bringing their former manager David Moyes back after new owners, The Friedkin Group, decided to sack Sean Dyche and talks will take place on Friday

arts.ttl: Newcastle and Villa charged over 'half-time melee'
arts.sum: Newcastle United and Aston Villa are charged by the FA after a 'half-time melee' during the side's Premier League match on 26 December.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Aston Villa now in talks to sign £1.7m 'jewel' refusing to pen new contract, Manchester City also keen
'I spoke to him a few weeks ago': Sky Sports journalist shares David Moyes stance as Everton links emerge
arts.sum: Everton are now looking for a new manager after parting company with Sean Dyche on Thursday. The Toffees have sacked Dyche after a run of...

arts.ttl: Richard Keys skewers West Ham new man in brutal social media post
arts.sum: Graham Potter’s ambition will be under scrutiny at West Ham United after spending two years “just taking Chelsea’s money”, Richard Keys has said. Keys posted... The post Richard Keys skewers West Ham new man in brutal social media post appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa set to rival Arsenal and Chelsea in transfer for BREAKOUT English star
arts.sum: Aston Villa are among the sides continuing to track Jamie Gittens after his breakout campaign for Dortmund this year, with a summer transfer potentially on the cards. According to CaughtOffside, Villa ‘like’ Gittens and are seeking to sign a natural inside forward to play on the left, having deployed the likes of John McGinn and Morgan Rogers there so far this season.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt monitoring Niclas Füllkrug for a potential transfer
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt are closely monitoring Niclas Füllkrug’s situation, according to Florian Plettenberg. The striker is on their shortlist for signings and is a concrete candidate should Omar Marmoush move to…

arts.ttl: Next Everton manager odds as David Moyes and ex AC Milan boss emerge as candidates to replace Sean Dyche
arts.sum: Dyche was axed by the Goodison Park club just hours before the FA Cup clash with Peterborough

arts.ttl: Surprise as West Ham player could move to Eintracht Frankfurt – Manchester City are key in drama
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt have put West Ham United’s Niclas Füllkrug high on their list if Omar Marmoush leaves for Manchester City this month. That’s according to journalist Patrick Berger, who reports that Füllkrug is high on Eintracht Frankfurt’s list as a possible successor to their star man. arts.ttl: 'He's a very attacking full-back': Aston Villa told £16.7m defender they want to sign is 'bullet fast'
arts.sum: Aston Villa have been busy in the first third of the January transfer window as they look to get some new signings over the line....
